title: SnackPirate's Aeromancy Additions
description: An addon for Iron's Spells 'n' Spellbooks that adds wind-based magic.
body:
### **Wind School**

The Wind school of magic is primarily themed around defense and agility, with much inspiration from Avatar: The Last Airbender and Dungeons & Dragons.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1160104/description_f78e31fa-b908-4312-8064-076899ff9238.png)

  

The focus item of this school (item used to make spells, equipment, and upgrades) is the **Breeze Rod**. 

### **Equipment**

Windmaker Armor - Set of robes that empowers wind-based magic.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1160104/description_e09eacdf-267c-430f-b69d-fe173b061f75.png)

Air Staff - Staff that empowers wind-based magic, and slightly decreases gravity for the user.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1160104/description_c8da23f0-127e-4dd7-8540-b9960a0f799a.png)

Updraft Tome - A powerful spellbook that starts with the Updraft spell, only found in Trial Chambers.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1160104/description_54d1abdd-b976-41fe-8a99-eff4eddf9432.png)

### **Spells**

Wind Charge - Conjure a wind charge capable of launching targets into the air.

Airstep - Perform a series of mid-air jumps in rapid succession.

Feather Fall - Give you and your surrounding allies the Slow Falling effect, weakening the effects of gravity.

Updraft - Launches multiple targeted enemies into the air, dealing fall damage and stunning the targets.

Asphyxiate - Remove the air from the target's lungs, slowing them and dealing damage.

Wind Shield - Give yourself a temporary shield of swirling wind, capable of reflecting incoming projectiles, physical and magical alike.
